title: dioscorea quartiniana var. stuhlmannii
intro: Dioscorea quartiniana var. stuhlmannii, also known as African wild yam, is a species of yam native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the production of cortisol and other hormones, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for menstrual relief and hormone balance. The health benefits of Dioscorea quartiniana var. stuhlmannii include reducing menstrual cramps, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting overall hormonal balance. Herbal preparations of Dioscorea quartiniana var. stuhlmannii include dried root, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote menstrual health and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.
